label: Reference text from family message
tone_notes: mixes history, birthdays, music, and novelty-day flavor
do_more_of: connect the world fact back to the birthday person
do_less_of: raw dumping of too many unrelated facts
sample_text: Sorry I’m a little late today, I was distracted by the sun, beach and Florida Men 😆!!! Today is a very important day... please take a minute to wish Peter a Happy Birthday!!! Happy Easter and hope you all had a great day 🐰😘!!!
